name: Golden Hour Tote
description: Structured silhouette with gold-tone hardware and rich interior lining. A statement piece for any occasion.

name: Midnight Mini Crossbody
description: Compact and chic with an adjustable strap. Fits your essentials without sacrificing style.

name: Blush Quilted Clutch
description: Soft quilted leather with a twist-lock closure. Perfect for evenings out.

name: Cognac Bucket Bag
description: Relaxed bucket silhouette in warm cognac. Drawstring top with a removable pouch inside.

name: Ivory Chain Shoulder Bag
description: Elegant ivory with a layered chain strap. Timeless design that pairs with everything.

name: Emerald City Satchel
description: Deep emerald green structured satchel with double top handles and a detachable strap.

name: Caramel Woven Tote
description: Handwoven texture in warm caramel tones. Spacious interior — your everyday luxury companion.

name: Noir Envelope Clutch
description: Sleek and minimal. Matte black envelope with a magnetic snap. Goes anywhere, fits everything that matters.

name: Rose Gold Zip-Around
description: Zip-around wallet bag with a rose gold zipper pull. Function meets glamour.

name: Dusty Mauve Hobo
description: Slouchy hobo silhouette in dusty mauve. Soft leather with a vintage-modern feel.

name: Tortoise Frame Bag
description: Structured frame bag with tortoise-shell kiss-lock closure. Retro-luxe and completely unique.

name: Champagne Flap Bag
description: Champagne shimmer with a layered flap and hidden magnetic closure. Made for celebration.
